en-US.resurrection-spotlight-email-title: Good to see you again. Open your email like an app?
en-US.resurrection-spotlight-email-subtitle: Pin your inbox to the taskbar. One click opens it in its own window, with all of Firefox’s protections.
en-US.resurrection-spotlight-email-title-2: Select your email to add to your taskbar

de.resurrection-spotlight-email-title: Schön, Sie wieder zu sehen. Sollen E-Mails wie eine App geöffnet werden?
de.resurrection-spotlight-email-subtitle: Heften Sie Ihren Posteingang an die Taskleiste an. Ein Klick öffnet ihn in einem eigenen Fenster mit allen Schutzmaßnahmen von Firefox.
de.resurrection-spotlight-email-title-2: Wählen Sie Ihre E-Mail-Adresse aus, die Sie zur Taskleiste hinzufügen möchten

en-CA.resurrection-spotlight-email-title: Good to see you again. Open your email like an app?
en-CA.resurrection-spotlight-email-subtitle: Pin your inbox to the taskbar. One click opens it in its own window, with all of Firefox’s protections.
en-CA.resurrection-spotlight-email-title-2: Select your email to add to your taskbar

en-GB.resurrection-spotlight-email-title: Good to see you again. Open your email like an app?
en-GB.resurrection-spotlight-email-subtitle: Pin your inbox to the taskbar. One click opens it in its own window, with all of Firefox’s protections.
en-GB.resurrection-spotlight-email-title-2: Select your email to add to your taskbar

fr.resurrection-spotlight-email-title: Heureux de vous revoir. Vous ouvrez votre compte e-mail comme une application ?
fr.resurrection-spotlight-email-subtitle: Épinglez votre boîte de réception à la barre des tâches. Un simple clic l’ouvre dans une fenêtre dédiée, avec toutes les protections de Firefox.
fr.resurrection-spotlight-email-title-2: Sélectionnez un compte e-mail pour l’ajouter à votre barre des tâches

it.resurrection-spotlight-email-title: È un piacere rivederti. Vuoi aprire la posta elettronica come un’app?
it.resurrection-spotlight-email-subtitle: Fissa la tua casella di posta sulla barra delle applicazioni. Un solo clic la apre in una finestra dedicata, con tutte le protezioni di Firefox.
it.resurrection-spotlight-email-title-2: Scegli l’indirizzo email da aggiungere alla barra delle applicazioni
